invariant: This registry is data only. Rendering is projection; receipt/validation remains authority.

templates.label: p-gon
templates.notes: Infinite family of convex regular polygons where p >= 3.

templates.label: n-simplex
templates.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

templates.label: n-cube / hypercube
templates.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

templates.label: n-orthoplex / cross-polytope
templates.notes: One of the three convex regular families for n >= 5.

templates.label: Mucube
templates.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

templates.label: Muoctahedron
templates.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

templates.label: Mutetrahedron
templates.notes: Regular skew apeirohedron in Euclidean 3-space with planar faces.

templates.label: Regular skew apeirohedra in Euclidean 3-space
templates.notes: 30 regular apeirohedra in Euclidean 3-space including 18 pure and 12 blended.

templates.label: Regular skew apeirohedra in hyperbolic 3-space
templates.notes: 31 regular skew apeirohedra with convex faces in hyperbolic 3-space.
